title: aspidium trifidum
intro: Aspidium trifidum, also known as the common polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aspidium trifidum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Aspidium trifidum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
